title: Room To Roam
content:
Strait is the path? He means we must not roam?
    Yes; but the strait path leads into a boundless home.
meaning:
This evocative piece by George MacDonald, titled "Room To Roam", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
